Denon's Disruptive Discord  

Description

1: Decrease Hitpoints by 4 (L18) to 36 (L130) per tick if target is not moving
2: Decrease AC by 0 (L18) to 39 (L130)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 0 Skill: Brass
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 0
Fizzle Time: 0 Resist: Magic
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
AE Range: 35 Fizzle Adj: 15
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: PB AE
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Jagged notes tear through your body.
Cast on other: Soandso winces.

Game Description

A screeching dissonance that causes 4 damage to up to %T nearby creatures and lowers their armor class by 0.

Items with this effect

  • McVaxius` Horn of War
  • McVaxius` Horn of War
  • Song: Denon's Disruptive Discord

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Song: Denon's Disruptive Discord
ClassLevel
BRD18
Expansion:

Duration:
2 ticks
  • Comments (12)
  • Sold By (4)
  • Quested (0)
  • Screenshots
Add Image

Merchants:


East Freeport
  • Inisis Trimpet - 1pp 1gp 5sp 7cp

Shar Vahl
  • Scribe Qualia - 11pp 2gp 5sp 6cp

South Qeynos
  • Chalea Volesga - 1pp 1gp 5sp 7cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Minstrel Eoweril - 1pp 1gp 5sp 7cp

    QuoteReply

    This song is 10 kinds of useless
    ▲ Page top
    resist resist resist resist
    QuoteReply
    # Dec 17 2010 at 11:59 AM Rating: Decent
    svann
    Scholar
    361 posts
    Is it my imagination or does this get resisted far more than our other aoe songs?
    ▲ Page top
    her is hwo it works
    QuoteReply
    # Mar 15 2008 at 7:29 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592295042355
    12 posts
    this is how this spell works <post patch> you have to have a target - a target - then it then takes off and then it damages everything around you point blank 16 a tick
    ▲ Page top
    DDD broken and error enhanced
    QuoteReply
    # Mar 15 2007 at 2:44 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592343002375
    46 posts
    The level 18 bard song known as Denon's Disruptive Discord doesn't work anymore. SoE in it's effort to nerf it has broken it. Also broken is using a Brass instrument (at least at level 18). I suppose SoE rushed to break this bard favorite because everyone was rushing to make a bard ...NOT. The Hero of EQ is the ever powerful necro. The pita of EQ is the bard.

    Just a tad more foresight and EQ would be #1 on the charts. Best I can suggest is Sony FIRE all mgmt from second level up to the top of SoE and start over. Anyone that works at SoE that does not have a level 20 BARD toon older than one year should also be fired. 'nuff said.

    Edited to remove the "I hate you now SoE"

    Edited, Mar 15th 2007 4:06pm by Ottoplay
    ▲ Page top
    Additional Location
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 02 2006 at 10:25 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1611533830763
    256 posts
    This song can also be purchased from Inisis Trimpet in East Freeport.

    Tip for Progression Servers: If you're coming from a mail city, such as Kelethin, make sure you get the mail quest before heading to Freeport.
    ▲ Page top
    found in..
    QuoteReply
    # May 29 2004 at 8:44 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592261057247
    20 posts
    I believe this spell is found in the PoK library. Just use the find ability to look for bard song merchants and check the different merchants out to see if they have it. Bought the spell earlier today. There are only 4 or so merchants to check. Good luck![/Black]
    ▲ Page top
    Brass?
    QuoteReply
    # Apr 23 2004 at 12:33 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591779303933
    4 posts
    Am i wrong or is this the first brass song we get? Funny since we got the brass ability at like lvl 12 or something like that. So waiting 6 lvls to use it seems wrong doesnt it??
    ▲ Page top
    RE: Brass?
    QuoteReply
    # Mar 31 2005 at 10:47 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592762819608
    143 posts
    I beleive it's all in the practices. I had a bit of some hard time keeping my points so when it's time to use this skill, hopfully you have some points to put into it after all those lvls.
    ▲ Page top
    Minstrel Silnon

    Minstrel Silnon in PoK library sells this.

    where is this spell found
    QuoteReply
    # Jun 10 2003 at 12:34 PM Rating: Default

    Anyone know where to find this spell??
    ▲ Page top
    RE: where is this spell found
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 25 2003 at 3:43 PM Rating: Default
    __DEL__1591749845897
    236 posts
    According to The Concert Hall (http://www.attcanada.net/~reaper/), this can be purchased at bard guilds in Kelethin and Qeynos.
